title: typeSeedMetaschema
description: The irreducible bootstrap: the hand-authored column description for the `type` type's own projection table obj_<type-type>. The generic projection engine derives every type's obj_<typeId> columns from that type's jsonSchema, but it cannot do so for `type` itself (the schema describing the type-defining type is exactly what it would be building — circular). This fixed, flat schema breaks the loop; the adapter compiles obj_<type-type> from it. Its properties are named so the compiler's camelCase->snake_case mapping yields exactly the legacy `types` table columns, so readTypeJson/writeTypeJson/createType change table name only, not column names. Carried in rootPayload.seedMetaschema (spec §rootPayload / §cqrs-projections).

metaPrimaryField.description: -> meta_primary_field. Field/expression computing item.value for instances.

metaAiInstructionsClaude.description: -> meta_ai_instructions_claude. Guidance for Claude on using this type.

jsonSchema.description: -> json_schema JSONB. The instance JSON Schema (Draft-07) this type projects from. A stored JSON document round-tripped as a unit.

sync.description: -> sync UUID[]. Function items that refresh instances from source.

supersededBy.description: -> superseded_by UUID[]. Type definitions replacing this one.

implements.description: -> implements UUID[]. Types whose contract this type fulfils.

extends.description: -> extends UUID[]. Types this type specialises.

indexes.description: -> indexes JSONB. Authored secondary-index declarations for this type's obj_ table.
